name: Jeb Bush
subject: Come meet me and my parents
body:
Friend,

Putting a face to a name is important, especially with all the emails I send you.

As you know, I'm not the only culprit. Mom and Dad have been emailing as well and I want you to be able to put a face to a name for them, too.

So I talked with them, and we're going to give you the chance to do just that. [**Today we 're launching a contest to fly one lucky winner down to Texas at the end of the month to meet Mom and Dad. All you have to do is chip in $1.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/igmkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrhyhmd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We'll have other contests on the campaign, but I can't promise we'll have another one like this.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bdjkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnlplgc_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**Enter now for your all expenses paid trip to meet "The Enforcer" and the 41st President of the United States, or as I call him, the world's greatest dad.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pfjtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgqhqmd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Oh, and one more thing, mom is insisting on getting a photo with our biggest supporters, so I hope you're ready to pose with the family.

Friend, don't forget, your flight and hotel is on us. All you have to do is pack your suitcase and enter now: [**Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/twzfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtzlzvp_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

See you in Houston,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/epdljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcsrshd_idnmmzcg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4357&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Saturday, October 3, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, October 23, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, October 23, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Q3 Mission Complete Celebration, with an approximate retail value of $0; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,725. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Lindsey Kolb
subject: Statewide tour wrap-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,
This week we traveled all over the state of Missouri.
>From Kirksville, Kansas City, Columbia, Springfield, Jackson,
Washington, Jefferson City, and to many other cities, we were met
with open arms by supporters, like yourself, who are wanting to
see a change in leadership in Missouri. Here are some highlights
from each day of our tour:
Monday
We had a great time at our rally with 100+ attendees in
Springfield on Monday at the Historic Firehouse No. 2.
Tuesday
Eric participated in firefighter training at Jackson Fire
and Rescue. Here Eric is with Captain Hecht.
Wednesday
Eric spoke to a group of excited supporters in
Washington, Missouri at the Rennick Riverfront Park.
Thursday
We had a huge rally at Mizzou with tons of students and
veterans coming out to support.
Friday
Eric spoke to a packed house in Kirksville on Friday.
The support from across the state for our mission is
rising and the momentum is unbelieveable. We want to thank each
and every one of you who came to our events, donated to our
cause, and helped us make this statewide tour possible. Stay
tuned for more updates from the trail. Onward to 2016!
Best,
Lindsey Kolb
Greitens for Governor - Volunteer Coordinator
PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER

This message was intended for: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com
You were added to the system September 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/iJ6v_LALYN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://echo7.bluehornet.com/p/oJ6v_LALYN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-19701591439-echo7-9AA6E4B693A780B1F6F72B7B779434F1@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.
clean_body: Peter, This week we traveled all over the state of Missouri. From Kirksville, Kansas City, Columbia, Springfield, Jackson, Washington, Jefferson City, and to many other cities, we were met with open arms by supporters, like yourself, who are wanting to see a change in leadership in Missouri. Here are some highlights from each day of our tour: Monday We had a great time at our rally with 100+ attendees in Springfield on Monday at the Historic Firehouse No. 2. Tuesday Eric participated in firefighter training at Jackson Fire and Rescue. Here Eric is with Captain Hecht. Wednesday Eric spoke to a group of excited supporters in Washington, Missouri at the Rennick Riverfront Park. Thursday We had a huge rally at Mizzou with tons of students and veterans coming out to support. Friday Eric spoke to a packed house in Kirksville on Friday. The support from across the state for our mission is rising and the momentum is unbelieveable. We want to thank each and every one of you who came to our events, donated to our cause, and helped us make this statewide tour possible. Stay tuned for more updates from the trail. Onward to 2016! name: Claire & Zack, Bernie 2016
subject: [Important Request] Attend a Debate Watch Party
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
From day one, Bernie has said that no president, not even the best president you can possibly imagine, is enough to take on the Koch Brothers and the billionaire class all on his or her own.
This moment requires a grassroots movement of millions and millions of people. That's what Bernie is talking about when he says we need a political revolution, and that's what we are organizing through our campaign. And after we win the election, the movement we're building will give us the power to take back our country from the billionaire class.
And there's one very important step you can take right now to push our effort forward.
On October 13th -- nine days from today -- supporters from across the country are hosting debate watch parties during the first Democratic Primary debate of the campaign.
**Right now there are more than 2,400 Debate Watch Party events already on our website. Can you find one and sign up to help grow our political revolution?**
**Yes,[I will sign up and RSVP to attend a Debate Watch Party on October 13th.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c2/1419693408/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")**
**No,[but I will make a contribution of $25.43 -- the average donation we've received in the past week -- to help pay for the materials required to pull off the events.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c3/1419693408/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em1510040-dwp")**
We found a Debate Watch Party near you. Here's the information for it:
**What:** DEBATE WATCH PARTY in Garrett Park
**Where:** Morrison house
107o7 shelley court
Garrett Park, MD 20896
**When:** Tuesday, October 13th
8:00 pm EDT
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vmlh)
One thing you can expect from the night is this: when the organizing portion of the evening is complete and the debate is over, we're going to immediately put people to work.
Movements are built in small steps, but this evening will be a big step forward for our political revolution.
**[But only if you sign up to attend a Debate Watch Party right now.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c2/1419693408/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c2/1419693408/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")
It's been amazing how many of you are already organizing out there for this campaign. All across America. In every community. Nothing like this has ever happened so early on any presidential campaign in history.
I can't to see what we're able to accomplish together on October 13th.
All of our best,
Claire Sandberg & Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c0/1419693408/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151004-dwp-attend")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4c1/1419693408/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4ce/1419693408/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4cf/1419693408/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2515/43f17890/57b1a447/621fd4cc/1419693408/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
